results.title: Escapement - Wikipedia
results.snippet: Escapement is a feedback regulator controlling speed of mechanical clock. Resonator and escapement together form mechanical feedback oscillator. Bidirectional: impulses pass from wheel train to oscillator; locking and release signals pass from oscillator to wheel train.
